product: Agent mode in Genie Agents will soon be available by default for workspaces…
tagline: Agent mode in Genie Agents will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in July 2026.
what_it_does: Agent mode in Genie Agents will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in July 2026. Agentic mode uses multi step reasoning to answer complex business questions by running multiple SQL queries, iterating on results, and returning a report with citations, visualizations, and supporting tables. note Agent mode was formerly known as Research Agent.
why_it_matters: How can we reduce order cancellations this holiday season?
plain_summary: Agent mode in Genie Agents will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in July 2026. Agentic mode uses multi step reasoning to answer complex business questions by running multiple SQL queries, iterating on results…
key_takeaway: Agent mode in Genie Agents will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in July 2026.
